identity.name: Sereni
identity.tagline: A safe space for your mind.

usage.primary: Main buttons, active states, key branding elements (Sage Green)
usage.background: Global app background (Warm Cream - never pure white)
usage.crisis: Use for the 'Get Help' or 'Crisis Mode' UI. Warm Amber, NOT Red.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/20 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/30 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.crisis: bg-crisis text-crisis-foreground hover:bg-crisis/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-bold shadow-md animate-pulse-slow

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-border/40 shadow-card p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-border/40 shadow-card p-6 hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white/50 border-border focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-xl px-4 py-3 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/60

chat_bubbles.user: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-3 max-w-[80%]
chat_bubbles.ai: bg-white border border-border/50 text-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-5 py-3 max-w-[80%] shadow-sm

hero_bg.usage: Landing page hero background with overlay

ambient_bg.usage: Subtle background texture for chat or dashboard

motion.guidelines: Use slow, gentle motions. No rapid flashes. Typing indicators should have a rhythmic, breathing feel.

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 on all backgrounds.
Interactive elements must have distinct focus states (ring-2 ring-primary/50).
Crisis buttons must be identifiable by more than just color (use icon + text).

specific_instructions.landing_page: Use the 'hero_bg' image with a soft gradient overlay (white/90 to transparent). Center the value proposition. 'Get Started' button should be pill-shaped and large.
specific_instructions.chat_interface: Two-column layout on desktop. Left sidebar is collapsible glassmorphism. Main chat area has the 'ambient_bg' as a very subtle watermark or background. Typing indicator is crucial.
specific_instructions.crisis_mode: If risk is high, do NOT turn the screen red. Instead, slide down a 'Support Panel' from the top with the 'crisis' color (Amber) as a border or soft background. Show helpline numbers clearly.
specific_instructions.grounding_modal: A full-screen or large modal overlay. Use the 'grounding_focus' image. Guide the user through 5-4-3-2-1 with large text and 'Next' buttons. Don't auto-advance too fast.

universal_guidelines.themes: Light theme preferred for this therapeutic context. Dark mode should be 'Dim' (slate/grey) not 'Black'.
general_rules: Use proper spacing (p-8, p-12) to let the content breathe.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Do not use native HTML select/date inputs; use Shadcn equivalents.
